source_string: Command blocks are not enabled on this server
translation: Ronwar axanion lár caraiti sina serveressë
Yuhta "@s" meter mehta i engwë carila sa

source_string: Note! When you sign the book, it will no longer be editable.
translation: Ela! I parma lauva vistaima yá tehtuvalyes.

source_string: Height limit for building is %s blocks
Are you sure you want to open the following website?
translation: Ma nalyë tanca i merilyë latya sina natsemen?

source_string: Do you want to open this link or copy it to your clipboard?
translation: Ma merilyë latya sina limë hya renitas?

source_string: Never open links from people that you don't trust!
You have entered an invalid IP address or a player that is not online
translation: Úmára tengessë IP, hya lasinwa tyalindo

source_string: Custom bossbar [%1$s] has a maximum of %2$d
translation: Custom bossbar %s has a maximum of %s

source_string: Custom bossbar [%1$s] has no players currently online
translation: Véra téma turcotto %s lá sáma tyalindor i nár sinomë

source_string: Custom bossbar [%1$s] has a value of %2$d

translation: Nothing changed. The player is not an operator
Made %s no longer a server operator

translation: The nearest %s is at %s (%s blocks away)

source_string: The nearest %1$s is at block %2$s, (y?), %3$s (%4 blocks away)
translation: The nearest %s is at %s (%s blocks away)

source_string: Could not op (already op or higher): %s
translation: Nothing changed. The player already is an operator

source_string: Function and script files have been reloaded.
There are no objectives on the scoreboard
There are no tracked players on the scoreboard

translation: Nómë enontiëo tulcina mi %s, %s, %s [%s], mi %s rá %s

source_string: Failed to connect to the server
Alternatively, here's some we made earlier!
Want to share your preset with someone? Use the below box!
translation: Ma méralyë ósatë nótulcalelya? Yuhta i colca nún!

source_string: %1$s was squashed by a falling anvil
%1$s walked into a cactus whilst trying to escape %2$s
%1$s was squashed by a falling block
%1$s tried to swim in lava to escape %2$s
%1$s was burnt to a crisp whilst fighting %2$s
translation: %1$s was burned to a crisp while fighting %2$s

source_string: %1$s was skewered by a falling stalactite
Are you sure you want to quit?
translation: Ma nalyë tanca i merilyë etelelya?

source_string: This demo will last five game days, do your best!
translation: Sina lanwassë termaruva rér lempë tyalmessë. Almien!

source_string: You have passed your fifth day, use F2 to save a screenshot of your creation
translation: Lempëa ré avánië. Á yuhta %s meter carë fanwemma mairelyo.

source_string: This demo will last 5 in-game days (about 1 hour and 40 minutes of real time). Check the achievements for hints! Have fun!
translation: This demo will last 5 in-game days (about 1 hour and 40 minutes of real time). Check the advancements for hints! Have fun!

source_string: Use %1$s, %2$s, %3$s, %4$s and the mouse to move around
translation: À yuhta %1$s, %2$s, %3$s, %4$s ar i tenta lelya

source_string: The demo time has expired, buy the game to continue or start a new world!
translation: I nevië telina sí. Á homanca i tyalmë itan cacarë, hya yesta vinya ambar!

source_string: Are you sure you want to lock the difficulty of this world? This will set this world to always be %1$s, and you will never be able to change that again.
translation: Ma nalyë tanca i merilyë tancata i hrangwë sina ambaro? Sinen nauvas %1$s tennoio ar lalyë lertauva envistaitas.

source_string: You were kicked from the game
You were kicked from the game:

translation: I tyalië lá mára (á ricë atayesta tyalmelya ar i yestama)

source_string: The authentication servers are currently down for maintenance.
translation: The authentication servers are currently not reachable. Please try again.

context: Label on the first tile button in the servers grid

source_string: Are you sure you want to remove this server?
translation: Ma nalyë tanca i merilyë haita sina server?
